title: Block O' Heaven
description:
A parody mod of Avaritia with some JoJo references. 
This is not a ridiculously broken mod. 
Singleplayer Only!
body:
_What you are reading right now is the description of the mod - Block O' Heaven..._

##
# **ABOUT**

  I am going to be straightforward. This mod was created with one main purpose: to create a "semi-broken" shortcut to help you and me get through difficult modpacks when added.
 
  Over time, things have gotten developed, and as a result, the mod no longer only creates a cheap shortcut to complete other difficult modpacks but also generates its own content. Enough content that the Creator himself considered uploading the mod to CurseForge, and now ModRinth too.


# **FEATURES**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  Semi-unbalanced bosses like "Diavolo" or "Thawne"
  
  (Kind of) Overpowered gear named the "Hebium" or "Ultimate" set, including tools, weapons, and even a considerable all-in-one tool.
  
  Recipes like Enchanted Golden Apple come back.
  
  An unbalanced early-game weapon named "Combat Cane."

</details>




# **RECOMMENDED MODS AND PROGRESSING**

  Mods: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

JEI, Apple Skin (optional), ProjectE, Ore Excavation/Vein Mining.

</details>



  Progress (You can get the Ultimate set if you want, but if you just get the Witherized Diamond gear, that is still enough): 
  

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

    1. Get the "combat cane".
    
    2. Get the Metalized Skeletal gear (armor set, sword/bow/both, and paxel).
    
    3. Acquire the Witherized Diamond gear.
    
    4. Get the better version of Witherized Diamond gear dropped from Abel and Scar.

</details>



##
  _NOTE: ~~Everything above may be outdated in the future. If you're not playing the 1.20.1 version of the mod, then there's no metalized skeletal or witherized diamond gear. Good luck!~~_
  
  _The mod has now backported!_
